index.name: coding-standards-immutability
index.description: Immutability-first coding style with file organization, error handling, and code quality guidelines.
index.capability_zh: 不可变性编码规范、文件组织、错误处理

index.name: security-review-checklist
index.description: Comprehensive security checklist covering OWASP Top 10, authentication, input validation, and deployment verification.
index.capability_zh: OWASP Top 10 安全检查、认证、输入验证、部署验证
index.invocation_phrase: 命中关键词时自动强制触发

index.name: tdd-workflow
index.description: Test-driven development with RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle, 80%+ coverage requirement, and three test types.
index.capability_zh: 红绿重构流程、80%覆盖率、三层测试（单元/集成/E2E）
index.use_case_zh: 需要写测试的功能开发、Bug修复

index.name: planning-before-coding
index.description: Hard-gate workflow - no implementation before design approval. Use when starting any feature work.
index.capability_zh: 设计审批门禁、先规划再编码
index.use_case_zh: 复杂功能、创意工作、新项目启动
index.invocation_phrase: 说「规划」「计划」「设计」时建议

index.name: systematic-debugging
index.description: 5-step systematic debugging methodology for errors, bugs, or unexpected behavior.
index.capability_zh: 5步系统调试法、错误定位、问题溯源
index.use_case_zh: 调试Bug、排查问题、分析错误

index.name: anti-give-up
index.description: Prevents AI from giving up on difficult problems. Activates on failure patterns.
index.capability_zh: 防AI放弃协议、穷尽解决方案、L1-L4升级
index.use_case_zh: 复杂调试问题、连续失败、困难问题
index.invocation_phrase: 说「失败」「try harder」「别偷懒」时激活

index.name: frontend-design-principles
index.description: Design before code - establish bold aesthetic direction before writing any frontend code.
index.capability_zh: 设计先于代码、美学方向、UI组件规范
index.use_case_zh: 前端UI开发、页面设计、组件编写

index.name: design-system-generator
index.description: Generate complete design systems (colors, typography, patterns) from product descriptions.
index.capability_zh: 设计系统生成、配色方案、字体配对、161种产品类型
index.use_case_zh: 新项目启动、不知道用什么视觉风格

index.name: session-memory
index.description: Extract reusable patterns from sessions and persist them for future use.
index.capability_zh: 会话记忆提取、模式识别、经验固化
index.use_case_zh: 长期项目、会话总结、模式提取

index.name: continuous-learning
index.description: Extract reusable patterns from sessions and persist them for future use.
index.capability_zh: 持续改进、模式提取、经验积累
index.use_case_zh: 项目优化、重构、持续改进
index.invocation_phrase: 说「学习」「改进」「优化」时建议
